text: Drop a Mentos in soda and watch the magic unfold! What happens? A geyser shoots sky-high! It's a classic science experiment. But why? Let's dive into the science behind this explosion. Mentos have a rough surface. When dropped in soda, they cause rapid bubble growth from dissolved CO2. The result? An epic fountain! Perfect for outdoor fun—just be prepared! Try it yourself, but remember to do it outside! Like for more fun experiments!
